title: Karim Ki Dukaan
subtitle: Dilli ki gali mein daba hua raaz...
mystery: Karim Chacha ki mashoor biryani dukaan mein aaj subah tijori khaali mili. 2 lakh ka hisaab gayab. Par dukaan ka darwaza toot nahi tha — andar waale ne khola tha.

clues.name: Khaata Bahi
clues.description: Hisaab ki bahi mein ek page phaata hua — last teen mahine ke entries gayab.

clues.name: Duplicate Chabi
clues.description: Tijori ke paas doosri chabi mili — same shape, nai bani.

clues.name: Chandi Ki Anguthi
clues.description: Chacha ki anguthi neeche giri padi thi — kisi se ladai hui thi.

characters.name: Salim Bhai
characters.description: 5 saal se kaam karta hai. Teen mahine se bonus nahi mila — gussa tha.

dialogues.response: Nahi ji, 10 baje nikal gaya tha main.

dialogues.trigger: Ye duplicate chabi kahan se aayi?
dialogues.response: Woh... woh maine banwayi thi sirf emergency ke liye! Karim chacha ko pata nahi tha!

dialogues.trigger: Teen mahine ka hisaab kyun gum hua?
dialogues.response: Mujhe kya pata... main toh bas kaam karta hoon!

characters.name: Rashida Begum
characters.description: Samne ki dukaan waali. Raat ko jaagti rehti hai.

dialogues.response: Haan, raat 11 baje Salim bhai wapas aaye the dukaan pe — mujhe taajjub hua tha.

spots.name: Counter 🍛
spots.description: Chacha ka purana counter — drawer thoda khula hai.

spots.name: Tijori 🔐
spots.description: Lohe ki tijori — darwaza khula pada hai.

spots.name: Farsh 🪵
spots.description: Purana farsh — kuch chamak raha hai kone mein.

title: Imambara Ka Saaya
subtitle: Lucknow ki raat mein chupi maut...
mystery: Imambara ke pujari Hafiz Sahab subah namaaz ke waqt nahi aaye. Unhe unke hujre mein mritak paya gaya. Koi bahari nishaan nahi — par ek khaas khusboo kamre mein thi.

clues.name: Itr Ki Boo
clues.description: Kamre mein ek khaas itr ki boo — 'Shamama' brand, sirf khaas dukaan mein milta hai.

clues.name: Tooti Tasbih
clues.description: Hafiz sahab ki tasbih tooti padi thi — kisi se haath-apai hui.

clues.name: Wasiyat Ka Kagaz
clues.description: Ek naya wasiyat kagaz — property Naseem ke naam kiya hua, kal ki taareekh.

characters.name: Naseem Khan
characters.description: Property ke liye kaafi arsa se jhagda tha chacha se. Shamama itr laata tha unhe.

dialogues.trigger: Aakhri baar kab mile the chacha se?
dialogues.response: Kal shaam ko... milne aaya tha. Bas pyaar se mila tha.
Woh... unhone khud likhi! Maine sirf... sirf madad ki thi unhe!

dialogues.trigger: Shamama itr aap use karte ho?
dialogues.response: Haan magar... main wahan gaya hi nahi tha kal!

characters.name: Bilal Muazzin
characters.description: Roz subah 4 baje aata hai. Aaj kuch alag tha.

dialogues.response: Haan, raat bhar ek aadmi aata-jaata raha. Naseem jaisa lagta tha — wahi khusboo bhi aayi.

spots.name: Hafiz Ka Hujra 🚪
spots.description: Chhota sa kamra — darwaza adha khula hai.

spots.name: Farsh 🪨
spots.description: Purana farsh — kuch bikhra pada hai.

spots.name: Mez 📋
spots.description: Lakdi ki mez — kagazon ka dher.

title: Tulsi Ghat Ki Chori
subtitle: Devta ke khazaane par buri nazar...
mystery: Tulsi Ghat ke mandir se chandi ka ghanta aur prasad ki bhari potli raat bhar mein gaayab. CCTV nahi tha — par ek bhakt ne kuch dekha tha.

clues.name: Geeli Mitti Ke Nishan
clues.description: Mandir ke andar geeli mitti ke paon ke nishan — ghat se aaye the.

clues.name: Laal Dhaga
clues.description: Mandir ki jaali mein laal dhaga fansa hua — pujari nahi pehnte aise.

characters.name: Mahesh Prasad
characters.description: Roz subah 4 baje safai karta hai. Aaj zyada jaldi aa gaya. Laal dhage ka ek bangle tha uske haath mein.

dialogues.response: Mujhe... neend nahi aayi. Bas kaam karne aagaya.
Woh toh... har koi pehenta hai! Mera nahi hai!

characters.name: Kamla Devi
characters.description: Roz raat ko mandir aati hai. Aaj kuch alag dikh gaya.

dialogues.response: Haan bete! Raat 2 baje Mahesh andar ghus raha tha — bade jatan se, jaise chori se aa raha ho.

spots.name: Mandir Ka Pravesh ⛩️
spots.description: Sangmarmar ka pravesh — neeche geeli mitti.

spots.name: Peechi Jaali 🪟
spots.description: Lohe ki jaali — kuch fansa hua dikh raha hai.

title: Johri Ka Jhooth
subtitle: Jaipur ke bazaar mein sach kitna qeemti hai...
mystery: Seth Jugal Kishore Johri ko kisi ne dhamki di — 'Meri baat maano, warna teri dukaan ki saari naajaiz dealings sab ko pata chalegi.' Seth ne police ko nahi bataya. Aaj unhi ki dukaan jalane ki koshish hui.

clues.name: Dhamki Ka Message
clues.description: Seth ji ke purane phone mein ek message — 'Kal raat tak 5 lakh — warna sab khatam.'

clues.name: Petrol Ki Gandhh
clues.description: Dukaan ke bahar petrol ki tej gandhh — ek khali bottle bhi mili.

clues.name: Toota Chashma
clues.description: Gali mein ek toota chashma — kisi ka zewar uthate waqt toot gaya.

characters.name: Pappu Lal
characters.description: Seth ka sabse bada dushman. Kuch saal pehle Seth ne uski dukaan todwayi thi benami complaints se.

dialogues.trigger: Seth ji se koi dushman thi?
dialogues.response: Unse toh kai logon ki dushman thi. Meri bhi hai — unhone mera dhandha barbad kiya.
Ghar pe tha... akela.
Mera chashma toh... arey yeh... main explain kar sakta hoon!

characters.name: Bhagwan Das Munim
characters.description: 30 saal se Seth ka hisaab rakhta hai. Naajaiz dealings ka pura pata hai usse.

dialogues.response: Haan, ek hafte se. Pappu Lal ka kaam lag raha hai — woh petrol bhi istemal karta hai dukaan ke andor ke liye.
Ji... woh toh... main nahi bata sakta. Seth bahut bura maanenge.

spots.name: Dukaan Ki Mez 💎
spots.description: Sheeshe ki mez — neeche ek purana phone pada hai.

spots.name: Dukaan Ke Bahar 🚪
spots.description: Dukaan ka baahari hissa — kuch geela sa lag raha hai.

spots.name: Seedhi Gali 🏘️
spots.description: Tangi gali — kuch toot hua sa pada hai.

title: Para Ka Khoon
subtitle: Kolkata ki baarish mein dooba raaz...
mystery: Baarish ki raat Shyambazar para mein Durga Prasad Sharma ki laash mili — chat pe. Koi marks nahi the, par woh akele upar nahi gaye the. Koi unke saath tha — kisne unhe dhakka diya?

clues.name: Bujhi Bidi
clues.description: Chat pe ek bujhi bidi — Durga Prasad nahi pite the. Koi aur tha.

clues.name: Insurance Paper
clues.description: Durga ji ki mez pe ek insurance paper — nominee mein Kartik ka naam.

clues.name: Geele Jutte
clues.description: Seedhiyon ke paas geele jutte — size 9, Durga ji ka size 7 tha.

characters.name: Kartik Sharma
characters.description: Kafi karz tha uske upar. Baap ki insurance ka intejar tha. Bidi pita hai.

dialogues.trigger: Raat ko chat pe gaye the?
dialogues.response: Nahi! Main neeche tha! Baap akele gaye hoge!
Baap ne khud kiya tha! Main kya kar sakta hoon!

dialogues.trigger: Ye geele jutte size 9 ke hain — aapka size?
dialogues.response: Main... woh baarish mein gaya tha thodi der ko... chat pe nahi gaya tha! Bas seedhi tak!

characters.name: Sundar Kaka
characters.description: 50 saal se para mein hai. Sab kuch dekhte hain.

dialogues.response: Haan bhai — raat 11 baje Kartik tezi se seedhiyan chadhta dikha. Upar se zor ki awaaz aayi — phir khamoshi.

spots.name: Makan Ki Chat 🏠
spots.description: Khuli chat — baarish abhi bhi ho rahi hai.

spots.name: Neeche Ka Kamra 🚪
spots.description: Seedha kamra — mez pe kagazon ka dher.

spots.name: Seedhi Ke Paas 🪜
spots.description: Andheri seedhi — neeche kuch pada hua hai.
